backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that handles contact form submissions with CRUD operations (submit, query by project type/email, delete) and includes blob storage mixin for asset management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two portfolio component fixes: correcting image path construction for 120 gallery images and enhancing error logging for failed image loads.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing styling enhancements, component implementations, and custom hooks for the Casa Di Vida interior design website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, and component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Casa Di Vida React application with viewport meta tag and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page application with Navigation, Hero, Services, Portfolio, About, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section with asymmetric grid layout displaying company philosophy and four core values (Passion, Excellence, Collaboration, Innovation) with scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact form component with validation, project type selection, toast notifications, and contact information display using React Query mutation for backend submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand logo, quick navigation links, social media icons, copyright notice, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component with background image, logo, heading, tagline, and two CTA buttons that scroll to portfolio and contact sections. Includes a scroll indicator animation at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation bar component with logo, desktop menu links, and mobile sheet menu. Tracks scroll position and active section, applying background blur and styling when scrolled.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio gallery component displaying residential, commercial, and before-after projects with category filtering. Maps image numbers to project cards with titles, descriptions, and error handling for missing images.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section component displaying six interior design services (space planning, color consultation, furniture selection, full room design, lighting design, styling) in a responsive card grid with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting contact form data to the backend actor, with automatic query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to trigger scroll-based animations when elements enter viewport, with support for reduced motion preferences and configurable threshold/margins.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm, sophisticated color palette for luxury interior design (browns, creams, terracotta) in both light and dark modes, plus scroll animation utilities and typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root render with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, elegant shadows, custom font families (Inter, Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond), spacing, and animation keyframes for accordions and fade effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Casa Di Vida interior design website state at version 21, documenting features for hero, services, portfolio galleries (residential/commercial/before-after), about, and contact sections, with a known issue of 120 gallery images failing to load.
